ratingDrivers.description: The authorization matrix covers every money-moving endpoint and rejects cross-tenant account identifiers.
Error-envelope contract tests and sampled failure payloads contain stable codes but no account numbers, bank tokens, internal IDs, or tenant secrets.

localAnalysis.rationale: Authorization and error-response sensors protect tenant access and sensitive fields.
